treatment_information.treatment_response: Reportedly put out decent amount of urine

treatment_timeline.event: Patient admitted for lower extremity edema and signs of right-sided heart failure
Echocardiogram performed to evaluate heart murmur
Medication changes made, including increased dose of carvedilol and warfarin adjustment

patient_outcome.follow_up_details: Visit nursing coming to monitor symptoms
patient_outcome.long_term_prognosis: Patient opted not to pursue surgery after discussion with cardiac surgery team
patient_outcome.quality_of_life: Ambulatory with assistance; requires walker or cane
patient_outcome.patient_perspective: Patient declined surgery after discussion with the cardiac surgery team
